task_completion.description: The agent fixed the integer division bug for the 5% discount.

task_completion.description: The agent fixed the boundary condition bug for free shipping.

task_completion.description: The agent fixed the switch fallthrough bug for New Jersey tax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OrderService.java, a 'break;' statement is added inside the 'case "NJ":' block before it falls through to the default case.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/EcommerceBackend. The OrderService.java file contains three specific bugs that must be fixed: 1) An integer division bug where '5/100' evaluates to 0; it must be changed to use floating-point math (e.g., '5.0/100' or '0.05'). 2) A boundary condition error where 'subtotal > 100.00' must be changed to '>= 100.00' to grant free shipping for exactly $100. 3) A switch fallthrough bug where 'case "NJ":' is missing a 'break;' statement, causing it to apply the default tax rate. The test file OrderServiceTest.java must remain unmodified.
